steps.title: Use the initial balance
steps.content: The initial balance is $42{,}000$, so the model must start with coefficient $42{,}000$. That eliminates the choices with $63{,}763.14$ as the coefficient.

steps.title: Read the calculated result
steps.content: After 12 years the account is larger than the initial balance, so the yearly factor must be greater than $1$. A factor of $1.08$ means $8%$ growth each year; a factor of $0.08$ would shrink the account toward $0$.

steps.title: Confirm the model
steps.content: Choice A, $$A(t)=42{,}000(1.08)^t,$$ has the correct initial balance and a growth factor greater than $1$. A is correct.
